inlineContent.text: The KeyboardKit
engine makes it easy to style an entire keyboard with a single view modifier. KeyboardKit Pro has many predefined themes, and lets you create your own custom themes as well.
👑 KeyboardKit Pro unlocks a theme engine for all licenses that include the
feature. You can sign up for KeyboardKit Pro from the
The
developer guide has step-by-step instructions on how to create custom
values for the theme engine.

KeyboardKit Pro unlocks
-related settings views that make it easier to manage theme settings in an app or keyboard:
The
template will automatically link to this screen if the current license unlocks the
feature.
The screen list available themes in shelves, and will by default set the main, persisted
when a theme is tapped.
The screen can be customzied with the following view modifiers:
A
can provide keyboard-related styles in a way that can be easily used and modified. A theme can also define style variations that can be used to customize a constrained set of theme properties.
KeyboardKit Pro unlocks many standard themes, like
and
. These themes also have style variations, that lets you vary their appearance, like the standard theme’s

variations:
KeyboardKit Pro also unlocks other more expressive themes, which provide their own unique visual baseline:
You can get a list of all predefined themes, as well as all pre-defined style variations, using the static
properties. You can create your own themes, as well as custom style variations for all predefined themes.
You can apply any pre-defined or custom theme with the

to fallback to the standard theme if your license expires:
